scenario_scope: Cross-project deduplication and chapter-boundary decision for the six mined historical AI projects as one local architecture and evidence lineage.

cases.decision_rationale: Across all six projects, interface presence, deterministic fixtures, producer declarations, simulated metrics, adapter learning, runtime output, and external capability repeatedly diverge. The existing evidence chapter should gain the evidence cell, trainable-state manifest, response-causality receipt, and name-to-effect law.
required_before_drafting: map each law to exact project source notes and negative cases
treat the six repositories as one non-independent lineage
ingest independent measurement and causal-provenance literature
evidence_transition_preconditions: metric origin, verification method, independence, and effect state are machine-readable
accepted transition required for any support-state change
promotion_blockers: most capability paths were not reproduced
non_claims: does not establish model capability or metric validity
does not treat local lineage repetition as replication

cases.decision_rationale: CCA closure inheritance, MoECOT holdout mismatch, BeastBrain benchmark theater, BugBrain report contradictions, Trainer placeholder quarantine, and Best Model metric-origin failures jointly justify metric provenance, honest missingness, retry ceilings, causal checkpoint/output binding, and transitive claim revocation.
required_before_drafting: separate fixture, internal, holdout, and external evidence
evidence_transition_preconditions: upstream quarantine invalidates all dependent surfaces
missing evidence resolves to unknown or not attempted
promotion_blockers: external-looking retained results are incomplete or quarantined
metric origins and evaluator independence are uneven
non_claims: does not accept any retained external benchmark score
does not establish benchmark authenticity or performance

cases.decision_rationale: Compiler-first intent, canonical registries, bounded context, routing, execution, verification, artifact, and promotion surfaces converge on a request-to-effect architecture. BugBrain's authority operationalization and Best Model's scaffold integrations show why each edge needs an effect receipt and shared authority tuple.
required_before_drafting: draw canonical state versus projection boundaries
connect every named transition to a material postcondition
promotion_blockers: no project implements the complete integrated path with reproduced effects
authority and durability are incomplete across projects
non_claims: does not establish deployed integrated architecture
does not establish secure authority or durable transitions

cases.decision_rationale: CCA retry ceilings, MoECOT generation/debt ledgers, BeastBrain growth failures, Trainer campaigns/quarantine, and Best Model champion/challenger artifacts support a negative-knowledge configuration frontier and evidence-gated improvement transaction.
required_before_drafting: separate router evidence levels from improvement evidence
promotion_blockers: retained improvement results are local mechanism evidence
external capability uplift and safe autonomous growth are unverified
non_claims: does not establish autonomous research quality

cases.decision_rationale: BeastBrain supplies primary DKL/Portia lineage; CCA separates durable semantic state from context materialization; MoECOT adds memory governance; BugBrain operationalizes compact signed context; Best Model exposes transaction gaps; Trainer supplies experiment governance. The live spine lacks one owner for semantic object identity, typed ontology, graph/vector retrieval, merge/supersession/forgetting, and restart-consistent durable state.
required_before_drafting: ingest independent knowledge-graph, graph-RAG, agent-memory, consolidation, and transactional-persistence literature
deduplicate against Virtual Context ABI, context transactions, procedural memory, claim ledgers, and artifact graphs
define a unique thesis and chapter position
evidence_transition_preconditions: chapter manifest and source matrix validated
no support-state promotion without accepted evidence
promotion_blockers: current support is one local historical lineage
several durable-memory transitions remain scaffold or non-durable
independent empirical memory evaluation is absent
non_claims: does not add the proposed chapter
does not establish durable correct memory or retrieval quality

validation_boundary: Deduplicates six local projects into cross-project chapter actions and one deferred durable-memory boundary. It does not validate any capability, benchmark, architecture, routing, memory, security, speech, readiness, self-improvement, AGI, or ASI result.
non_claims: does not change chapter order or add the deferred chapter
does not publish private project content
